$schema: CaseLoad Select Core Chassis · Custom Fields v1
description: Lead-level data points captured at intake and updated through the journey. These drive band routing, journey selection, and decline logic. All fields attach to Contact entity in GHL.

fields.description: From intake form.
From intake form.
Primary contact email.
Primary contact phone in E.164.
Drives snippet variant selection.
High-level acquisition channel.
Specific referrer, campaign, or referrer name.
UTM campaign parameter for attribution.
Set by Screen auto-detect or intake form.
Granular practice area, e.g. 'Residential Closing', 'Shareholders Agreement'.
Free-text matter description from Screen conversation.
Province or state where matter resides. Defaults to Ontario.
Named opposing party for conflict check. Optional.
Lawyer-set after running conflict check.
Dollar value at stake. Drives Value axis. Practice-area module sets tier thresholds.
Drives Urgency axis. Crisis triggers Band A override.
0 to 10. Higher means simpler matter. Set by Screen heuristics.
0 to 10. Lead readiness to engage. Drives long-term hold routing if low.
Composite CPI score 0 to 100, derived from inputs.
Band assignment per CRM Bible v5.1. A ≥50% net ratio, B 16-50%, C <16%.
Only set for Band C. Drives sub-track routing in J3.
Practice-area-specific value tier from module overlay.
Reason for band override if not by net ratio.
Named referrer if referral. Drives priority weighting.
True if existing client of the firm.
True if preferred_language matches a firm-supported language.
Qualitative fit assessment from Screen.
When the lead expects to engage. Long-term hold trigger.
Currently active journey for routing.
Timestamp the active journey started. Drives 48h rule.
Hard deadline before backstop fires. Compressed by urgency.
Lawyer Take/Pass decision state.
Reason for decline, set during J4.
Timestamp retainer was signed. Triggers J7 closing-day SMS path and J12 review request.
Initial retainer dollar amount.
Timestamp matter completed. Secondary trigger for J12.
When J12 SMS fired. Used for follow-up timing.
When the review actually posted. Closes the J12 loop.

implementation_notes: Create each as a Custom Field in GHL Settings → Custom Fields. Attach to Contact entity.
GHL field types map directly: TEXT, LARGE_TEXT, EMAIL, PHONE, NUMERIC, DATE, MONETARY, CHECKBOX, SINGLE_OPTIONS, MULTIPLE_OPTIONS.
For SINGLE_OPTIONS, options array order matters in the dropdown. Keep in priority or alphabetical order as appropriate.
Total: 8 identity fields, 6 matter fields, 4 CPI input fields, 5 CPI output fields, 5 engagement modifier fields, 5 journey state fields, 5 outcome fields. 38 fields total.
Group labels become folder names in GHL Custom Fields UI for easier navigation.
When the CaseLoad Screen webhook delivers payload, it must POST these exact field keys. Field key contract is binding.
